name: shared-json-util-before-delete
tags: json util shared extract refactor delete dead code node utility task:e766dad2
body:
When a helper function exists in a file scheduled for deletion, extract it to a shared util BEFORE writing code that depends on it — not after.

**Why:** Writing the new code first and planning to extract later risks the new code depending on a soon-deleted source, creating dead code on arrival.

**How to apply:** In grooming, check if any helper in a to-be-deleted file is needed by new code. If yes, extraction is a prerequisite checklist item, not an afterthought.
